content.rendered:
Research Studies

Representative Projects:
  • Research Study for Guidelines for National Sustainable Urban Freight Transport System
  • Research Study on Framework For Urban Freight Transport and Action Plan For Indian Cities
  • Research Study on Aerial Tramways as Public Transport Mode For Indian Cities
  • Research Study for Service Level Benchmark for six cities- Delhi, Nanded, Vijayawada, Jaipur, Jammu, Patna
  • Study of Estimation of Green House Gas (GHG) Emission and Energy Consumption & Co-benefits of Sustainable Urban Transport Projects for GEF- SUTP Demonstration cities namely Pimpari-Chinchwad, Mysore, Hubli-Dharwadh, Naya Raipur and Indore
